title: Making POSIX filesystems replicated and highly available
abstract: Tired of dealing with replicated and highly available file systems? This tool has got your back! Think of it as giving your files a set of invisible wings, allowing them to seamlessly fly across multiple servers. No matter what disaster strikes, it ensures quick recovery, keeping your data safe and accessible. Come see how you can make your file system super reliable today!
abstract_zh: 你还在为文件系统复制和高可用性而头疼吗？别怕，这款工具帮你轻松搞定！就像给你的文件穿上了一双隐形的翅膀，让它在多个服务器之间自由飞翔。无论遇到什么灾难，它都能迅速恢复，确保数据不离手，让你的数据安全无忧！快来看看怎么让文件系统变得超级可靠吧！
